title: bus subscriber loop never started; cross-instance broadcast is dead
description: AppState::broadcast() and deliver_live() publish to MessageBus (state.rs lines 303-309) but main.rs never calls bus.subscribe() or starts a receiver task. On a single-process (LocalBus) deployment messages publish to a broadcast channel with zero receivers and are silently dropped. On a Redis deployment the PUBLISH goes to Redis but no task reads from it. UserJoined, UserLeft, BROADCAST, DELIVER, and all other non-group messages are lost cross-instance. nie-14sh.35 tracks the group-send path specifically; this covers the subscriber loop being absent for all message types.
